roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:TO SET OR DISPOSITION & APPOINT ATTORNEY/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE IS UNAVAILABLE TO ACCEPT APPOINTMENT FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON(S): LACK OF RESOURCES OR FUNDING,/CTAPPTS:MICHAEL LINSCHEID/X:PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTIONTO DISMISS COUNTS 1 & 2 & 5 TO 9 DUE TO DOUBLE  JEOPARDY -IS GRANTED (CODE57),/MO PC 1385:COUNTS 3 AND 4 DISMISSED IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE (CODE68)- DEFENDANT IN CUSTODY FOR 3 DAYS/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TN:TANYA WALLACE/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE IS UNAVAILABLE TO ACCEPT APPOINTMENT FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON(S): LACK OF RESOURCESOR FUNDING,/X:COREY   ALLEN APPEARED FOR ARRAIGNMENT OF DEFENDANT ON MORNING CALENDAR AND MARIA LOPEZ APPEARED AS A FRIEND OF THE COURT FOR CJC SETTING OR DISPO AT 1330 AND TO DECLARE PDUNAVAILABLE/X:ATTORNEY TO BE APPOINTED IN DEPARTMENT 8 ON 12-31-09/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/DOP/GTWM/987,2/BAIL:5,000/CTORD:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X:COURT FINDS THIS MATTER ELIGIBLE CJC, MATTER TRANSFERRED TO CJC/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPO IN CJC AND FOR APPOINTMENT OF ATTORNEY/DOP/
